cards.name: Radagast
cards.quote: In the woods of Rhosgobel, the creatures find solace in my presence.

cards.name: Pallando
cards.quote: The sea calls to me, its depths holding secrets untold.

cards.name: Alatar
cards.quote: From the East I come, seeking wisdom among the stars.

cards.name: Dorwinion Bowmen
cards.quote: With arrows swift as the river's flow, we guard our land.

cards.name: Dorwinion Infantry
cards.quote: Strong as the vines of our vineyards, we stand united in battle.

cards.name: Rohirrim Guards
cards.quote: Beneath Orthanc's shadow, once-proud riders stand watch in silence.

cards.name: Rhosgobel Rabbits
cards.quote: In the moonlight, mischief hops back home.
cards.actionEffect: If the caster is not in an army, return the caster to capital.

cards.name: Adumir
cards.quote: The shadows of old haunt the paths I tread.

cards.name: Annatorion
cards.quote: A sword is but a tool; wisdom wields the true power.

cards.name: Braega
cards.quote: My strength lies in the bond of kin, unbreakable and fierce.

cards.name: GhanBuriGhan
cards.quote: I am the voice of the wild; listen and you shall understand.

cards.name: Celdacil
cards.quote: Noble blood flows in my veins, guiding my hand in honor.

cards.name: Attired for the Winelords
cards.quote: Adorned in finery, our spirits lift with the promise of gold.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn), and gain 2 gold.

cards.name: BountyfulSeason
cards.quote: When the year is kind, even the poor have a full board.
cards.actionEffect: Gain +2 <sprite name="gold">, +1 <sprite name="timber">, +1 <sprite name="leather">.

cards.name: Dawn
cards.quote: At dawn the dark yields, though not willingly.
cards.actionEffect: Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Free People units for 1 turn and dispels Doors of Night.

cards.name: Provided by the Elves
cards.quote: The Elves give with grace, not haste.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal a moderate amount.

cards.name: Sun
cards.quote: The sun lays bare what shadow would conceal.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Grants Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> to all Humans and Hobbits for 1 turn, and halts all Troll units.

cards.name: Woven by the Galadhrim
cards.quote: The Galadhrim weave cloaks that hide even longing.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Fury of Ulmo
cards.quote: When Ulmo stirs, the deep remembers wrath.
cards.actionEffect: Environmental event. Halts all navy or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units.

cards.name: RageOfUlmo
cards.quote: The deep remembers wrath when Ulmo stirs.
cards.actionEffect: All naval <sprite name="ws"> or embarked <sprite name="ws"> units on water/shore tiles take moderate damage and are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Hope Reborn
cards.quote: Hope is reborn when all lesser things are spent.
cards.actionEffect: Remove negative status effects in an area of 2 hexes from caster.

cards.name: Caravans
cards.quote: Caravans know the price of every road.
cards.actionEffect: Sell up to 3 available resources and gain 25% extra <sprite name="gold"> versus normal sale value.

cards.name: Northmen Stand Firm
cards.quote: The Northmen stand as weathered timber in the storm.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Athelas
cards.quote: The kingly leaf comes to hand when the road is darkest.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character: heal 15 HP and remove Poisoned <sprite name="poisoned">/Burning <sprite name="burning">.

cards.name: A Mithril coat
cards.quote: Mithril's light outlasts the pride of kings.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: gain Fortified <sprite name="fortified"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Druadan Forest
cards.quote: The hush of Druadan Forest is deep as root and as old as the first road through the dark.

cards.name: Rhosgobel
cards.quote: In Rhosgobel, the trees keep their own counsel, and none should presume to answer for them.

cards.name: Derndingle
cards.quote: Derndingle shelters the ancient wood with a silence that feels almost vowed.

cards.name: Eagle's Eyrie
cards.quote: High on the eyrie the Eagles keep a lonely watch.

cards.name: Edoras
cards.quote: Edoras keeps its golden roofs against the sky, and the wind there still remembers riders.

cards.name: The Carrock
cards.quote: The Carrock rises from the river like a held breath, old as the ford beneath it.

cards.name: WestFold
cards.quote: WestFold opens to the plains with a stubborn calm that no storm has taught to bow.

cards.name: Eastfold
cards.quote: Eastfold lies open to wind and horse-track, and its fields remember riders before plowmen.

cards.name: NorthernGondor
cards.quote: Where the mountains meet the sky, ancient tales linger.

cards.name: Erech
cards.quote: Erech remembers the oath-stones, and even the wind there speaks with old restraint.

cards.name: BeornHouse
cards.quote: BeornHouse stands as a stronghold of hearth and stern hospitality, where the bears’ memory is never far.

cards.name: Theoden
cards.quote: The sword is a mighty ally, but it is the heart that must lead the way.

cards.name: Gwaihir
cards.quote: Gwaihir sees the winds before they rise.

cards.name: Treebeard
cards.quote: Treebeard remembers the young world, and speaks slowly of it.

cards.name: Saruman the White
cards.quote: The power of the White Tower shall not be underestimated.

cards.name: Rivermen
cards.quote: The river's song guides our oars as we defend our kin.

cards.name: Woodmen
cards.quote: The forest is our home, and we are its fiercest guardians.

cards.name: Woodmen Hunters
cards.quote: Silent as the falling leaf, we stalk our prey.

cards.name: Tower Wardens
cards.quote: The wardens of Orthanc stand unshaken, for they guard more than stone.

cards.name: Lore Seekers
cards.quote: They search the old places where knowledge still sleeps.

cards.name: The 5 ride again
cards.quote: When the five kindle their fire, no shadow dares stand before them.
cards.actionEffect: All allied Maia <sprite name="maia"> characters on the map gain Haste <sprite name="haste"> (2 turns) and Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Starlight Dispatch
cards.quote: The wise do not travel blindly when the stars may guide them home.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character not in an army: return them to your capital.

cards.name: Wisdom of the Ages
cards.quote: Old lore heals where steel cannot reach.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in your hex: heal 20 HP. If the target has Mage <sprite name="mage"> skill, also gain +1 <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Rings of Lore
cards.quote: The council remembers what the world has forgotten.
cards.actionEffect: Reveal as seen the hexes where Galadriel, Elrond, and Gandalf stand.

cards.name: Voice of Authority
cards.quote: A word spoken with rightful power bends the will without breaking it.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied population center: gain +15 loyalty and +1 <sprite name="gold">.

cards.name: Counsel of the Wise
cards.quote: The council sees many paths; only a fool takes the first.
cards.actionEffect: Draw a card from the top 3 of your deck.

cards.name: The Tower's Kindness
cards.quote: He spoke softly, as one who tends a friend, yet the door was locked from without.
cards.actionEffect: All mages at Orthanc gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (3 turns), but are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Beasts Bidden to Serve
cards.quote: The birds flew where he commanded, though they knew not whose voice they truly obeyed.
cards.actionEffect: Allied Beast <sprite name="beast"> characters in radius 3 gain Strengthened <sprite name="strengthened"> (2 turns) and Haste <sprite name="haste"> (2 turns).

cards.name: Far Shore, Faded Star
cards.quote: Go east, where the stars grow thin and no voice calls you back.
cards.actionEffect: Allied units within 5 hexes of any map border gain Hope <sprite name="hope"> (3 turns) and Encouraged <sprite name="encouraged"> (3 turns).

cards.name: The Second Sending
cards.quote: He too was given a road that led away, veiled in counsel that sounded like care.
cards.actionEffect: Move the caster to a random hex on the map. Gain Arcane Insight <sprite name="arcaneinsight"> (3 turns).

cards.name: Host of Orthanc
cards.quote: The Stewards gave him the tower's keys long ago, yet the guest has barred the gate from within.
cards.actionEffect: Can only be played at Orthanc. All allied units in radius 1 become Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).

cards.name: Bannerlords
cards.quote: Their banners ride before them like dawn over a forest ridge, bright with the memory of elf-lords.

cards.name: Gondorian Infantry
cards.quote: Steadfast and true, they stand like stone against the tide.

cards.name: Beast Of The Woods
cards.quote: The beast of the wood moves where no road is safe.

cards.name: Bears
cards.quote: The bears come with the old wrath of the wild.

cards.name: Beasts
cards.quote: The beasts of the wild heed neither horn nor hedge.

cards.name: Bow of Alatar
cards.quote: The eastern hunter's bow does not miss what the eye has chosen.
cards.actionEffect: Target enemy character in radius 1: wound for 15. If caster has Mage <sprite name="mage"> 3+, also reveal the target's surroundings for 1 turn.

cards.name: Hood of Pallando
cards.quote: Beneath Pallando's hood, even the road forgets its traveler.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in this hex gains Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (2 turns). The caster reveals radius 2 for 1 turn.

cards.name: Robes of Radagast
cards.quote: The brown robes carry the memory of root and feather.
cards.actionEffect: Target allied character in this hex heals 20 health. If caster is on forest or grasslands, also heal caster for 10.

cards.name: SouthernMirkwood
cards.quote: South Mirkwood is old with trails, fumes, and the patient watch of hidden things.

cards.name: Rohan
cards.quote: The land of horse-lords sings with the echoes of galloping hooves.

cards.name: MistyMountains
cards.quote: The Misty Mountains hold their teeth against all who pass.

cards.name: Anduin
cards.quote: The Great River carries the memory of all kingdoms.

cards.name: GapOfRohan
cards.quote: A narrow pass where courage meets the mountains' might.

cards.name: SouthernGondor
cards.quote: The sun sets over golden fields, a land of dreams.

cards.name: Riders Of Rohan
cards.quote: The thunder of our horses shall echo in victory.

cards.name: Ring of Orthanc
cards.quote: He wore a ring on his finger.
cards.actionEffect: The caster gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> (2 turns) and reveals all Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> enemy units within 4 hexes. The caster's next mage action costs 1 less resource.

cards.name: Deceiving the White Council
cards.quote: He told us to seek the Ring in the Gladden Fields. He had known for long where it lay.
cards.actionEffect: Apply Confused <sprite name="confused"> (3 turns) to all enemy characters in a target region. Enemy armies in that region are Halted <sprite name="halted"> (1 turn) as their orders are undermined.

cards.name: Robe of Many Colours
cards.quote: He was not Saruman the White; he was Saruman of Many Colours.
cards.actionEffect: Remove all positive status effects from a target enemy character and allies in their hex. The caster gains Haste <sprite name="haste"> (1 turn) and Hidden <sprite name="hidden"> (1 turn).
